isi.driveFileNames: GIRLSET - Little Miss (Paolo Cortez Holiday Remix).mp3
isi.lyrics:
Lyric GIRLSET - Little Miss (Paolo Cortez Holiday Remix)

Romanization

Little miss sweet
Little miss cute
Little miss oufff
With the attitude
Little miss nice
But I might bite
Don’t try
I got a million moods

I’m little miss

Why u lookin at me
Like ur offended
All this sugar and spice
That I’m blessed with
Got me busy at the top
So wassup
I’m polite when ur good
But i’m rude when ur not

Can’t help it they fall like dominos
Can’t help it I’m so phenomenal
I been down I been down
I been up
Feeling myself
And I can’t get enough

Here then gone
Chameleon
As soon as u figure me out
I change

If u wanna know
Who I am
I’ll tell u my name

Little miss sweet
Little miss cute
Little miss oufff
With the attitude
Little miss nice
But I might bite
Don’t try
I got a million moods

Little miss hot
Little miss cool
Little miss let’s
Break all the rules
Little miss nice
But I might bite
Don’t try
I got a million moods

I’m little miss

Gooo with the flow
Mess with the energy
Big eye roll
Oh
Bad vibes
That ain’t my type
no no no drama
When I arrive oh

Switch on u
I’m seasonal
Picky but I’m reasonable
Textie with my bestie
In the group chat
If he feasible

Here then gone
Chameleon
Soon as u figure me out
I change

If u wanna know
Who I am
I’ll tell u my name

Don’t try
I got a million moods

Don’t try
I got a million moods

I’m little miss

I’m little miss

isi.lyrics:
Lyric ZICO & Lilas Ikuta - DUET

Romanization

Good day, good vibe
Count it
いち に set net
Yeah Yeah Yeah Yeah Yeah Yeah Yeah Yeah
ZICO X ikura
Let's ride

Yeah she my favorite song
gyesok bulleo Did I say too much?
Take us back to analog
neoman namgiji, kkeuneo modeun neteuwokeu
teonteibeure ollata ta ta
seororeul ttara chuneun cha cha cha
doksoneun ppajigo malkkeumhaejyeo
ttak kolla han mogeume alttalttal

No space in between
Lowkey blackout weekend
Harmony making
naneun natge, neoneun nopge
jeongbandaeui eumsaek
ttaro noneun geurimche
mulgameul seokdeusi swirl swirl
yeonjuhae Let's duet

もう頭から離れない
二人で重ねるメロディー
口ずさむほどに熱くなる魔法
言葉より
歌で聞かせて

あれ それ すべて (ワッショイ)
朝から晩まで (オレたち)
ブチ上げ we don’t care (jeo kkeutkkaji)
もっと ノッて こうぜ

どれなの？

止まれない

踊らせて

Lowkey blackout weekend
Echoes go wavy
deo ppalli deo meolli
sijageun chit chat
seukeiri keojyeo big band
